name: Artichokes & Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the artichokes and beans.
2. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the artichokes until tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Add the green beans and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes. Drain and keep warm.
4. In a separate pan, sauté garlic in walnut oil for 1 minute.
5. Add the diced red pepper to the pan and continue to warm.
6. Mix all ingredients together and serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 124; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 20g; PRO: 4g; SOD: 6mg; FAT: 4g.
